title: GTC Spotlights NVIDIA RTX PCs and DGX Sparks Running Latest Open Models and AI Agents Locally
summary: The paradigm of consumer computing has revolved around the concept of a personal device — from PCs to smartphones and tablets. Now, generative AI — particularly OpenClaw — has introduced a new category: agent computers. These devices, like the NVIDIA DGX Spark desktop AI supercomputer or dedicated NVIDIA RTX PCs, are ideal for running personal […]
title_es: NVIDIA RTX: computadoras de escritorio para ejecutar modelos de IA localmente
bajada: NVIDIA presentó en GTC 2026 nuevas PCs RTX y la DGX Spark, diseñadas específicamente para ejecutar agentes de IA y modelos abiertos de forma local. Esta iniciativa busca descentralizar la IA al llevar capacidades de cómputo significativas al escritorio del usuario.
bajada_en: NVIDIA showcased new RTX PCs and the DGX Spark at GTC 2026, designed to run AI agents and open models locally. This initiative aims to decentralize AI by bringing significant computing capabilities to the user's desktop.

title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
title_es: Dataset de robótica médica y modelos de IA física para healthcare
bajada: NVIDIA y Hugging Face colaboran para lanzar el primer dataset de robótica médica y modelos foundacionales de IA física especializados en healthcare. Este recurso abre nuevas posibilidades para automatizar tareas médicas críticas con robots controlados por IA.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Hugging Face collaborate to launch the first healthcare robotics dataset and foundational physical AI models specialized in medical applications. This resource opens new possibilities for automating critical medical tasks with AI-controlled robots.

title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
summary: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.
title_es: NVIDIA NemoClaw: plataforma abierta de agentes IA con seguridad mejorada
bajada: NVIDIA anunció NemoClaw, su versión empresarial de la plataforma agentica OpenClaw, con enfoque en seguridad. Esta iniciativa posiciona a NVIDIA como actor clave en el ecosistema de agentes IA abiertos para usuarios corporativos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announced NemoClaw, its enterprise version of the agentic OpenClaw platform, with a focus on security. This move positions NVIDIA as a key player in the open agentic AI ecosystem for corporate users.

title: The Download: OpenAI’s US military deal, and Grok’s CSAM lawsuit
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Where OpenAI’s technology could show up in Iran  OpenAI has controversially agreed to give the Pentagon access to its AI. But where exactly could its tech show up, and which applications…
title_es: OpenAI acuerda dar acceso a Pentágono, genera controversia regulatoria
bajada: OpenAI cerró un acuerdo controvertido para dar acceso a sus tecnologías de IA al Pentágono estadounidense. Esta decisión plantea preocupaciones sobre seguridad nacional y el rol de empresas privadas en aplicaciones militares.
bajada_en: OpenAI closed a controversial deal to grant the Pentagon access to its AI technologies. This decision raises concerns about national security and the role of private companies in military applications.

title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
title_es: Holotron-12B: agente de IA para automatizar tareas en computadoras
bajada: Hugging Face presenta Holotron-12B, un modelo de 12 mil millones de parámetros diseñado para actuar como agente autónomo capaz de ejecutar tareas complejas en computadoras. Este tipo de modelos de bajo tamaño pero alta capacidad representan un avance importante para hacer IA agentica más accesible.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduces Holotron-12B, a 12-billion parameter model designed to act as an autonomous agent capable of executing complex computer tasks. This type of smaller yet capable model represents an important step toward making agentic AI more accessible.

title: Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI
title_es: NVIDIA Vera: CPU diseñado específicamente para IA agentica
bajada: NVIDIA lanzó Vera, una CPU de propósito específico optimizada para ejecutar sistemas de IA agentica eficientemente. Este hardware representa un paso importante hacia infraestructura especializada para una nueva categoría de aplicaciones.
bajada_en: NVIDIA launched Vera, a purpose-built CPU optimized for running agentic AI systems efficiently. This hardware represents an important step toward specialized infrastructure for a new category of applications.

title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
summary: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.
title_es: Picsart lanza marketplace de agentes IA para creadores
bajada: Picsart abrió un marketplace donde creadores pueden contratar agentes IA especializados para automatizar tareas. Con lanzamiento de cuatro agentes iniciales, este modelo muestra cómo la economía de agentes IA comienza a tomar forma.
bajada_en: Picsart launched a marketplace where creators can hire specialized AI agents to automate tasks. Starting with four agents and expanding weekly, this model shows how the agentic AI economy is beginning to take shape.

title: NVIDIA DSX Air Boosts Time to Token With Accelerated Simulation for AI Factories
summary: Setting up AI factories in simulation — decreasing deployment time from months to days — is  accelerating the next industrial revolution.  Nowhere was that more apparent than at GTC 2026, in San Jose, where NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang introduced NVIDIA DSX Air. Part of NVIDIA DSX Sim in the DSX platform, NVIDIA’s blueprint […]
title_es: NVIDIA DSX Air: simulación acelerada para fábricas de IA
bajada: NVIDIA presentó DSX Air, una herramienta que reduce el tiempo de despliegue de fábricas de IA de meses a días mediante simulación acelerada. Esta solución busca acelerar la adopción industrial de sistemas de IA complejos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA introduced DSX Air, a tool that reduces AI factory deployment time from months to days through accelerated simulation. This solution aims to accelerate industrial adoption of complex AI systems.

title: Roche Scales NVIDIA AI Factories Globally to Accelerate Drug Discovery, Diagnostic Solutions and Manufacturing Breakthroughs
summary: Roche's new deployment spans more than 3,500 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs across its worldwide operations and embedded across the entire value chain, massively scaling R&D productivity, next-generation diagnostics and manufacturing efficiencies.
title_es: Roche desplega 3.500 GPUs NVIDIA para descubrimiento de fármacos
bajada: Roche escaló globalmente su infraestructura de IA con más de 3.500 GPUs Blackwell de NVIDIA en operaciones de R&D, diagnósticos y manufactura. Este caso demuestra la adopción masiva de IA en pharma para acelerar descubrimiento.
bajada_en: Roche scaled its AI infrastructure globally with over 3,500 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs across R&D, diagnostics, and manufacturing operations. This case demonstrates massive adoption of AI in pharma to accelerate discovery.

title: [P] mlx-tune – Fine-tune LLMs on Apple Silicon with MLX (SFT, DPO, GRPO, VLM)
summary: Sharingmlx-tune, a Python library for fine-tuning LLMs natively on Apple Silicon using Apple's MLX framework.It supports SFT, DPO, ORPO, GRPO, KTO, SimPO trainers with proper loss implementations, plus vision-language model fine-tuning (tested with Qwen3.5). The API mirrors Unsloth/TRL, so the same training script runs on Mac and CUDA — you only change the import line.Built on top of mlx-lm and mlx-vlm. LoRA/QLoRA, chat templates for 15 model families, GGUF export. Runs on 8GB+ unified RAM.Not a replacement for Unsloth on NVIDIA — this is for prototyping locally on Mac before scaling to cloud GPUs.GitHub:https://github.com/ARahim3/mlx-tunesubmitted by/u/A-Rahim[link][comments]
title_es: mlx-tune: fine-tuning de LLMs en Apple Silicon con MLX
bajada: Se lanzó mlx-tune, librería Python para hacer fine-tuning de modelos de lenguaje directamente en Apple Silicon usando MLX. Soporta múltiples técnicas (SFT, DPO, GRPO) y funciona con solo 8GB de RAM unificada, democratizando el entrenamiento local.
bajada_en: mlx-tune launched, a Python library for fine-tuning language models natively on Apple Silicon using MLX. Supporting multiple techniques (SFT, DPO, GRPO) and running on 8GB unified RAM, it democratizes local model training.

title: We compressed 6 LLMs and found something surprising: they don't degrade the same way
summary: TL;DR:we shrink the MLP layers inside transformers (no quantization, no custom kernels) and measured how accuracy drops across ARC, HellaSwag, MMLU, and TruthfulQA.We expected similar behavior across models.We were wrong.Even more surprising, the original PPL improvements did not translate downstream on the bench.The key resultSome models areway more compressible than others.Gemma 2B → holds ~92% accuracy at 14% compressionLlama 3.1 8B → drops to ~85% at thesamecompressionSame method. Same % removed. Totally different outcomes.The efficiency frontier(chart below)Each line is a model compressed from 0 → ~40% MLP reduction.Takeaway:All models degrade smoothly — but at very different rates.What stood outGemma compresses best(flat curve early)Llama degrades fastest(especially larger models)MMLU drops first(reasoning breaks early)TruthfulQA barely moves(language stays intact)What this meansThere isn’t a single “right” compression level.There’s amodel-specific efficiency frontier.Example:RAG / chat → can tolerate more compressionreasoning agents → break quicklyWhy this is usefulWe outputstandard dense HF checkpoints:works with vLLM / TGI / llama.cppno custom kernelsstacks with quantizationSo you can take on of these smaller dense models and then quantize it too!What we're exploring nextautomatically finding the best compression point per modelexpanding to more architecturesunderstandingwhysome models compress betterimproved quality with even deeper compression, still runtime agnosticLooking for people who find this interesting and have suggestions for models they want compressed like this. It takes me about 25 minutes to do so open to any and all suggestions, insights etc.Right now we are using PPL under 2.0x baseline to create the frontier, but we could easily optimize around different SLO. Ijust need some insight from users as to what they are looking for.Would be excited to work with anyone who thinks this is cool.Models + code:https://huggingface.co/dystrioCurious wha
title_es: Compresión de LLMs: modelos se degradan de formas completamente diferentes
bajada: Un estudio revela que diferentes modelos de lenguaje responden muy diferente a compresión de capas MLP, sin seguir patrones predecibles. Este hallazgo sugiere que no existe un nivel de compresión universal y que cada modelo requiere análisis específico.
bajada_en: A study reveals that different language models respond very differently to MLP layer compression, without following predictable patterns. This finding suggests there's no universal compression level and each model requires specific analysis.

title: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
summary: Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.
title_es: Sears expuso conversaciones de chatbot a cualquiera en la web
bajada: Un fallo de seguridad en el chatbot de Sears expuso conversaciones que incluían información de contacto y datos personales. Este incidente subraya riesgos críticos de privacidad en sistemas de IA de atención al cliente mal asegurados.
bajada_en: A security flaw in Sears' chatbot exposed conversations containing contact information and personal data. This incident underscores critical privacy risks in poorly secured AI customer service systems.

title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.
title_es: Senadora Warren cuestiona acceso de xAI a redes clasificadas del Pentágono
bajada: Elizabeth Warren expresó preocupación sobre la decisión del Pentágono de otorgar a xAI acceso a redes clasificadas, citando outputs nocivos de Grok. Esta oposición refleja tensiones crecientes entre el sector privado de IA y supervisión estatal.
bajada_en: Elizabeth Warren expressed concern over the Pentagon's decision to grant xAI access to classified networks, citing harmful outputs from Grok. This opposition reflects growing tensions between private AI companies and government oversight.

title: Gamma adds AI image generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
summary: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.
title_es: Gamma Imagine: generación de imágenes IA para competir con Canva
bajada: Gamma agregó herramientas de generación de imágenes a su plataforma Gamma Imagine, permitiendo crear assets visuales con prompts de texto. Esta competencia a Canva y Adobe refleja cómo la IA generativa se expande hacia nuevos segmentos de productividad.
bajada_en: Gamma added image generation tools to its Imagine platform, allowing users to create visual assets from text prompts. This challenge to Canva and Adobe reflects how generative AI is expanding into new productivity segments.

title: Training-Free Agentic AI: Probabilistic Control and Coordination in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary:
arXiv:2603.13256v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems enable complex, long-horizon reasoning by composing specialized agents, but practical deployment remains hindered by inefficient routing, noisy feedback, and high interaction cost. We introduce REDEREF, a lightweight and training-free controller for multi-agent LLM collaboration that improves routing efficiency during recursive delegation. REDEREF integrates (i) belief-guided delegation via Thompson sampling to prioritize agents with historically positive marginal contributions, (ii) reflection-driven re-routing using a calibrated LLM or programmatic judge, (iii) evidence-based selection rather than output averaging, and (iv) memory-aware priors to reduce cold-start inefficiency. Across multi-agent split-knowledge tasks, we show that while recursive retry alone saturates task success, belief-guided routing reduces token usage by 28%, agent calls by 17%, and time-to-success by 19% compared to random recursive delegation, and adapts gracefully under agent or judge degradation. These results demonstrate that simple, interpretable probabilistic control can meaningfully improve the efficiency and robustness of multi-agent LLM systems without training or fine-tuning.
title_es: Control probabilístico para sistemas multi-agente de LLMs sin entrenamiento
bajada: Un paper propone REDEREF, controlador sin entrenamiento que mejora coordinación en sistemas multi-agente de LLMs mediante muestreo de Thompson y delegación inteligente. Los resultados muestran reducciones de 28% en tokens y 19% en tiempo de ejecución.
bajada_en: A paper proposes REDEREF, a training-free controller that improves coordination in multi-agent LLM systems using Thompson sampling and intelligent delegation. Results show 28% reduction in tokens and 19% in execution time.
